name: ExtendedRemoteFrameRate
title: ExtendedRemoteFrameRate
description: Returns the current rate of extended remote CAN messages on channel x.
return: Current rate of extended remote CAN messages on channel x in frames per second.

example.code: write ("Rate of extended remote messages on CAN1 = %d", CAN1.ExtendedRemoteFrameRate);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
